chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI SCRA No.109 of 2025 SCRA No.110 of 2025 Date Order with Signature of Judge SCRA No.109 of 2025 Fresh Case 1. For orders on office objection No. 26 2. For hearing of CMA No. 1055/2025 (exemption) 3. For hearing of Main Case 4. For hearing on CMA No.1056/2025 (stay) SCRA No.110 of 2025 Fresh Case 1. For hearing of CMA No. 1057/2025 (exemption) 2. For hearing of Main Case 3. For hearing on CMA No.1058/2025 (stay) 21.01.2026 Sardar Zafar Hussain, Advocate for the Applicant Per learned counsel these References are against the Judgment dated 06.03.2025 and 28.02.2025 and the impugned judgments have been premised on the ground that the main charges against the exporters have been vacated. He states that the order against the exporters was challenged in SCRA No. 26 of 2024, however, the same was withdrawn by the department on 01.12.2025. he states that under such circumstances, no case remains to be proceeded against the clearing agent, hence, these references may be dismissed as withdrawn. Order accordingly. Office to place copy of this order in connected file. A copy of this decision may be sent under the seal of this Court and the signature of the Registrar to the learned Customs Appellate Tribunal, as required per section 196 of the Customs Act, 1969. Judge Judge Amjad PS
